title: Tetris Tournament
description: Put your reflexes and strategy to the test in an exciting Tetris competition where players compete for prizes, glory, and the title of ultimate block-stacking champion.

title: ImagineHack 2025
description: A flagship hackathon that challenges participants to ideate, innovate, and develop impactful technology solutions while collaborating with like-minded creators and industry mentors.

title: Coding Competition
description: Challenge your programming skills through a series of coding problems designed to test logical thinking, algorithmic knowledge, and problem-solving abilities under pressure.

title: ImagineHack 2024
description: An innovation-focused hackathon where participants transform ideas into functional solutions, gaining hands-on experience in teamwork, product development, and pitching.

title: ImagineHack 2023
description: A platform for aspiring innovators to reimagine the future through technology, creativity, and entrepreneurship while tackling real-world challenges.

title: ImagineHack 2021
description: The inaugural ImagineHack experience, bringing together students to think, create, and launch innovative solutions through collaborative problem-solving and rapid prototyping.
